properties.note: Basemap extract coverage for production (SCOPE=regions in scripts/setup-map-data.sh). One box per region the portfolio touches: continental US, Tonga, Albania. Adding a country: add a box here (and a dev-sized one in map-regions-dev.geojson), add its names to INTERNATIONAL in src/lib/map/geocode.ts, then re-extract on the Studio (see deploy/README.md).
